the reviewer expresses confusion about the book content since they expected a different story. they clarify that the title led them to believe it was about a deer, but it is actually about a human character named bambina.

despite this misunderstanding, the sentiment is not negative because the user gives five stars to avoid unfair judgment. they explicitly state they have not read the whole book yet, so they are withholding a true opinion rather than criticizing the work itself.
